project_type: Full-stack app: Next.js 15 frontend + Python FastAPI backend + MCP servers for Google services
build_system: pnpm for frontend, pip for backend. No monorepo build tool.
test_framework: Jest (frontend, passWithNoTests), pytest (backend). Frontend lint via next lint.
verification_instructions: 1. Run frontend build: cd frontend && npm run build. 2. Run frontend lint: cd frontend && npm run lint. 3. Run backend syntax check: cd backend && python -m py_compile app/main.py
setup_instructions: cd frontend && pnpm install. cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt.
environment_constraints: Open internet. DO NOT MODIFY: hooks/useChatSocket.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/ws.ts, lib/voice.ts, middleware.ts, Providers.tsx, entity/, shared/, frontend/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts. CAN modify everything else in frontend/ and backend/.
contribution_requirements: Keep NextAuth route unchanged. Use separate OAuth flows for incremental scopes (backend endpoints). Store tokens/scopes per user in Firestore.
key_patterns: Backend API routers in backend/app/api/ registered in main.py. Frontend uses lib/api-extended.ts for fetch helpers. Settings page at frontend/app/dashboard/settings/page.tsx. Firestore models in backend/app/db/models.py, repositories in backend/app/db/repositories.py. UI components in frontend/components/ui/ (Card, Toggle, Button, etc). Theme uses CSS variables (--text-primary, --surface, --border, etc) and Tailwind with dark mode class.
directory_structure: ChronAI/ -> frontend/ (Next.js 15 app), backend/ (FastAPI), mcp-servers/ (google-calendar, google-tasks, google-gmail), shared/ (schemas). Backend: app/api/ (routers), app/agents/ (AI agents), app/db/ (Firestore), app/mcp/ (MCP client). Frontend: app/ (pages), components/ (UI), lib/ (utilities), hooks/ (custom hooks).
